plugins.name: claude-md
plugins.description: Generate and maintain a high-quality CLAUDE.md (Karpathy discipline + Anthropic best-practices + adaptive parallel-git workflow) via an idempotent managed block, plus /learn — append a rule whenever Claude makes a mistake (compounding engineering).

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Hook-enforced, branch-aware, ephemeral session handoff — auto-preserves open work to a per-branch, git-tracked docs/handoff/<branch>.md (status active|blocked, + derived board) so parallel branches/worktrees never collide; resolve deletes finished handoffs and prune clears merged/orphaned ones. The next session, even on another machine, continues seamlessly.

plugins.name: nova-gate
plugins.description: Adversarial completion-honesty gate — /gate spawns an independent verifier (separate context) that maps a session's completion claims to evidence (were the tests actually run? was scope kept? is anything unverified passed off as done?). Manual by default (zero context tax); opt-in Stop nudge via .nova/gate.on. Writes a verdict ledger that worklog consumes.

plugins.name: worklog
plugins.description: The record loop — /document synthesizes a session into a durable narrative (what was done, decisions & why, what was learned, what's left), not a git-log dump. Optional --visual renders a self-contained, Nova-branded HTML deterministically; verdict badges come only from nova-gate's ledger.
